nodes.name: Fetch Tender Metadata
nodes.notes: Returns: { id, reference_number, title, estimated_cost, submission_date, issuing_authority, status }

nodes.name: Build Report Data (Deterministic)
nodes.notes: Builds ALL structured data deterministically — verdict cards, matrix, per-criterion results. LLM only writes the narrative summary. This guarantees tables are always accurate even if LLM fails.

nodes.name: LLM — Narrative Summary Only
nodes.notes: LLM writes ONLY the summary + recommendation paragraphs. Max 600 tokens — small and focused. All tables, numbers, and verdicts come from deterministic code, never from LLM.

nodes.name: Parse Narrative (With Fallback)
nodes.notes: If LLM fails or returns unparseable output, a safe fallback narrative is used. Report generation NEVER blocks on LLM failure.

nodes.name: Build HTML Report
nodes.notes: Generates complete government-format HTML report with inline CSS only. WeasyPrint-safe: no flexbox, no grid, no external resources. Includes CRPF letterhead, master matrix, per-bidder cards, signature block.

nodes.name: POST HTML to FastAPI (PDF Render)
nodes.notes: FastAPI receives HTML, calls WeasyPrint internally, stores PDF, returns { report_id, download_url }. Timeout 60s — WeasyPrint on complex HTML can take 20-30s.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "tender_id": "{{ $('Build HTML Report').item.json.tender_id }}",
  "event_type": "report_generated",
  "actor": "n8n_wf5",
  "entity_type": "tender",
  "entity_id": "{{ $('Build HTML Report').item.json.report_metadata.tender_reference }}",
  "detail": "Eligible: {{ $('Build HTML Report').first().json.report_metadata.eligible_count }} | Ineligible: {{ $('Build HTML Report').first().json.report_metadata.ineligible_count }} | URL: {{ $json.download_url }}"
}
